'''Moorsh''' was the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] chief priest of the [[Crèche (clustership)|''Crèche'']], a [[yammosk]] [[clustership]]. He was fascinated by the tales that said the [[Ryn/Legends|Ryn]] had the power of divination by using [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] cards.

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' {{1st}}
